title: Kofi and the Lost Baby Elephant
synopsis: Young Kofi discovers a crying baby elephant in the savanna and embarks on a heartwarming adventure to help reunite the little one with its family.

pages.text: Kofi was walking through the tall golden grass when he heard a sad sound. Waaah! Waaah! What could it be?

illustration.description: A young boy with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes walking through golden savanna grass with gouache painting style, thick brushstrokes, warm orange sunset in background
illustration.alt: Kofi walking through tall grass in the savanna

pages.text: Behind a big baobab tree, Kofi found a tiny baby elephant. The little elephant was crying big tears. 'Don't cry,' said Kofi gently.

illustration.description: Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes kneeling next to a small crying elephant by a large baobab tree, painted in gouache style with thick brushstrokes and warm savanna colors
illustration.alt: Kofi comforting a crying baby elephant

pages.text: 'I'm lost!' trumpeted the baby elephant. 'I can't find my mama!' Kofi patted the elephant's trunk. 'I will help you find her.'

illustration.description: Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes gently touching the baby elephant's trunk, textured painterly gouache style with golden grass and expressive animals
illustration.alt: Kofi promising to help the baby elephant

pages.text: Kofi and the baby elephant walked together. They looked behind rocks and under acacia trees. No mama elephant anywhere!

illustration.description: Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes walking alongside a baby elephant through the savanna, painted with bold confident strokes in gouache style with warm colors
illustration.alt: Kofi and baby elephant searching together

pages.text: Then Kofi heard a loud trumpet call from far away. PAWOOOO! 'That must be your mama!' said Kofi excitedly.

illustration.description: Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes pointing toward distant hills with the baby elephant beside him, gouache painting with thick brushstrokes and orange sunset colors
illustration.alt: Kofi hearing the mama elephant's call

pages.text: They hurried toward the sound. There was mama elephant! The baby ran to her with joy. 'Thank you, Kofi!' trumpeted mama. Kofi smiled big.

illustration.description: Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes watching happily as a baby elephant reunites with its large mother elephant, painted in textured gouache style with warm golden savanna colors and expressive animals
illustration.alt: Happy reunion between baby elephant and mama

metadata.illustrationStyle: gouache painting, thick brushstrokes, warm savanna colors, expressive animals, textured painterly, golden grass, orange sunset, bold confident strokes

questions.question: What sound did Kofi hear in the grass?
questions.explanation: Kofi heard a sad crying sound from the lost baby elephant.

questions.question: What kind of animal did Kofi find?
questions.explanation: Kofi found a crying baby elephant behind the baobab tree.

questions.question: Why was the baby elephant sad?
questions.explanation: The baby elephant was sad because it couldn't find its mama.

questions.question: How did they find mama elephant?
questions.explanation: They found mama elephant by hearing her loud trumpet call from far away.
